data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for scope-based binding.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Scope-based binding (required/recommended/optional)' requirement, but there is no concrete evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms this requirement has been implemented or validated. The linked use case mentions the need for scope-based binding, but it does not provide specific evidence of its existence or functionality. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of scope-based binding being created or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for scope-based binding
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
